message: Update to 1.3.3 - Believable anatomical heart (CC mesh) replaces primitive toy.
releaseNotes: 1.3.3 - Bio-Synth ships a CC-Attribution anatomical heart GLB (~6MB, ~180k faces) with classic silhouette, vessels, fat pads, coronaries. Procedural cone/pipe bulk stays hidden. License: Get3DModels CC BY (see public/models/heart/LICENSE.txt).
